claim_boundary: This contract covers the current traceguard consumer projection, native route, and member-owned tests inside ResearchGuard v0.1.2. It does not prove source truth, unrun external work, installation, publication, or future AI behavior.

obligations.description: The public consumer entry and internal route inventory are exact.
